projectDescription: A white-label academy platform that lets coaches, consultants, and experts launch a branded online school in days, pre-loaded with professional courses and AI-powered customization.
keyFeatures: Pre-loaded curated library of professional business courses organized into Tracks
AI-powered lesson customization using Claude Sonnet 4.6
25+ block types in the visual TipTap editor (quizzes, flashcards, widgets, media)
Full white-label branding: custom domain, logo, colors, email sender
Stripe Connect payments with free, per-course, and subscription pricing models
Student management with enrollment, progress tracking, and auto-issued certificates
Multi-academy support: run multiple branded academies from one account
AI-assisted interactive widgets (calculators, scorecards, diagnostic quizzes)
Master library with forking: lessons stay synced unless customized
Onboarding engineered to go live in under 15 minutes
publicApiSurface: GET /api/v1/courses — List published courses in an academy
POST /api/v1/students — Add a student to an academy
GET /api/v1/students/:studentId — Get student detail with enrollment progress
DELETE /api/v1/students/:studentId — Remove student and revoke access
POST /api/v1/students/:studentId/enrollments — Enroll student in a course
API key authentication via Bearer token (prefix: fa_live_)
